title: PoliceOfficer
description: An NYPD member of service (the accused/subject officer) as tracked in CCRB's complaint database. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Civilian Complaint Review Board: Police Officers' dataset (2fir-qns4, 14 columns). Keyed on Tax ID; aggregates complaint counts per officer. CCRB publishes officer-level complaint histories — its distinguishing act of transparency.

taxId.description: NYPD Tax ID number ('Tax ID') — primary key.

activePerLastReportedStatus.description: Whether the officer is active per last reported status ('Active Per Last Reported Status').

lastReportedActiveDate.description: Last reported active date ('Last Reported Active Date').

totalComplaints.description: Total complaints against the officer ('Total Complaints').
